# Copilot Instructions

## Shared OMP Wrapper Validation Script

For `scripts/omp/test-cmd-wrappers.ps1`, follow `.github/instructions/omp-cmd-wrapper-validation.instructions.md`.
That file is a shared Windows PowerShell 5.1 validation utility; review it only for actionable behavior, safety, compatibility, or cross-repository divergence issues.
Do not leave stylistic-only comments on that file.
